title: 社交媒体禁令和数字宵禁将对英国青少年进行试验
originalTitle: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
summary: 政府将在年轻人尝试限制之前和之后采访他们及其父母，以评估他们的影响。
originalSummary: The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.
